text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh? This is strange. Is there no one here?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Honestly... I heard someone shout "princess," so I
came running right away, but it was all for
nothing?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
O Three Goddesses! Do you have any idea who
that voice I heard may have belonged to,
perchance?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Haha, as if I'd actually get a response...
